note: Mr. Thomas, a 68-year-old male with diabetes and hypertension, presented with dizziness and elevated blood sugar. Started on insulin glargine 10 units nightly and advised low-carb diet. Scheduled endocrinology follow-up in 1 month.

Ms. Rivera, a 45-year-old female with asthma, reported increased wheezing and cough. Given nebulized albuterol and oral prednisone. Plan to taper steroids and continue inhaled corticosteroid. Follow-up with pulmonology in 2 weeks.

Mr. Patel, a 59-year-old male post coronary stent placement, presented for routine follow-up. Continues aspirin and atorvastatin. Blood pressure well-controlled. Encouraged cardiac rehab and lifestyle modification.
